stem: Circle O has an area of 100π square units. Two diameters of the circle, line segment PR and line segment QS, are perpendicular to each other, dividing the interior of the circle into four congruent sectors. What is the area, in square units, of one of these four sectors?
rationale: Choice D is correct. The total area of the circle is 100π square units. Since the two perpendicular diameters divide the circle into four congruent (equal-area) sectors, each sector has area 100π/4 = 25π square units. Choices A, B, and C are incorrect and may result from dividing by 10, 5, or 2 instead of 4.
